name: PowerUp Elevation
short_description: PowerUp Elevation is a autorunning platform game in a farm full of elevators and deadly traps. Can you traverse the perils within and steal a kiss from your 'mate'?
detailed_description:
PowerUp Elevation is an cool little simple 'autorun' platform game set in a world full of crushing elevators and deadly traps. Avoid spikes, use gravity flip, pick up powerups and time your jumps well in increasingly challenging stages in order to steal a kiss from your mate before the "death" time runs out.


Features :
  • Slower or faster gameplay mode.
  • Two difficult settings/ two endings.
  • 6 worlds, each world contains 8 levels + 1 practice level.
  • You will be killed a LOT, so unlimited lives are enabled (but show time used).
  • The game can been played a bit slower than normal for casual players with no penaty.
